From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Third tier Romanian football league

Football league season

The **1987–88 Divizia C** was the 32nd season of [Liga III](/wiki/Liga_III "Liga III"), the third tier of the [Romanian football league system](/wiki/Romanian_football_league_system "Romanian football league system").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

The format has been maintained to twelve series, each of them having 16 teams. At the end of the season the winners of the series promoted to [Divizia B](/wiki/1988%E2%80%9389_Divizia_B "1988–89 Divizia B") and the last two places from each series relegated to [County Championship](/wiki/1988%E2%80%9389_County_Championship "1988–89 County Championship").[[2]](#cite_note-2)

*Edilul IJGCL Pitești* was renamed as [Unirea Pitești](/w/index.php?title=Unirea_Pite%C8%99ti&action=edit&redlink=1 "Unirea Pitești (page does not exist)").

*Minerul Mecanizatorul Șimian* was renamed as [Mecanizatorul Șimian](/w/index.php?title=Mecanizatorul_%C8%98imian&action=edit&redlink=1 "Mecanizatorul Șimian (page does not exist)").

*Minerul Jilț Mătăsari* was renamed as [Minerul Mătăsari](/w/index.php?title=Minerul_M%C4%83t%C4%83sari&action=edit&redlink=1 "Minerul Mătăsari (page does not exist)").

*Auto Timișoara* was renamed as [Auto Vulcan Timișoara](/w/index.php?title=Auto_Timi%C8%99oara&action=edit&redlink=1 "Auto Timișoara (page does not exist)").

*Obilici Sânmartinu Sârbesc* was renamed as [AS Sânmartinu Sârbesc](/w/index.php?title=AS_S%C3%A2nmartinu_S%C3%A2rbesc&action=edit&redlink=1 "AS Sânmartinu Sârbesc (page does not exist)").

*Chimia Zalău* was renamed as [Laminorul Victoria Zalău](/w/index.php?title=Laminorul_Victoria_Zal%C4%83u&action=edit&redlink=1 "Laminorul Victoria Zalău (page does not exist)").

### Other changes

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1987%E2%80%9388_Divizia_C&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Other changes")]

Șantierul Naval Tulcea entered into partnership with CSȘ Tulcea and was renamed as [Șantierul Naval CSȘ Tulcea](/w/index.php?title=%C8%98antierul_Naval_Tulcea&action=edit&redlink=1 "Șantierul Naval Tulcea (page does not exist)").

[Victoria FIUT Carei](/wiki/Victoria_Carei "Victoria Carei") took the place of Unio Satu Mare in [Divizia B](/wiki/1987%E2%80%9388_Divizia_B "1987–88 Divizia B") due to the merge between [Unio Satu Mare](/w/index.php?title=Unio_Satu_Mare&action=edit&redlink=1 "Unio Satu Mare (page does not exist)") and [Olimpia Satu Mare](/wiki/Olimpia_Satu_Mare "Olimpia Satu Mare").

[Minerul Turț](/w/index.php?title=Minerul_Tur%C8%9B&action=edit&redlink=1 "Minerul Turț (page does not exist)") took the place of Victoria FIUT Carei in Divizia C.
